series_metadata.series_description: Records pertaining to the Ohio Education Technology Conference including, but not limited to, reports, requests for quotations, requests for proposals, promotional materials, and forms. Contracts and agreements related to the conference are maintained according to the Board of Regents retention schedule for all such records.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Scan into the computer and destroy. If paper records are not scanned, retain 3 years following the end of the annual conference, then destroy ; Electronic: Retain 3 years following the end of the annual conference, then destroy, Paper: Recycle ; Electronic: Delete
